findings.title: Structure: ROLE-CAC-001 deviates from its role template
Structure: ROLE-CAC-002 deviates from its role template
Structure: ROLE-CAC-004 deviates from its role template
RACI: No Accountable role defined for PS-CAC-007 (Execute closure)
findings.detail: PS-CAC-007 (Execute closure) has ROLE-CAC-002 (Closure Analyst) as Responsible, but no role element carries A on this step. ROLE-CAC-001 (RM) is I on steps 2–7 and A on steps 1 and 8; ROLE-CAC-003 (Closure Approver) is I on step 7. The most consequential step — setting accounts to Closed and cancelling instruments — has no documented accountable owner.

findings.title: RACI: ROLE-CAC-006 (Financial Crime) has no RACI entry on any process step
findings.detail: ROLE-CAC-006 has no raci frontmatter field and no participation recorded on any process step. The role receives cases via EX-CAC-003 (sanctions hit routing) which is triggered from PS-CAC-004 — at minimum it should appear as C or I on PS-CAC-004, and may warrant A/R on the exception handling path.

findings.title: SYS-CAC-002 “Role in this process” block omits steps 2 and 3
findings.detail: SYS-CAC-002 (Core Banking System) “Role in this process” block states only: “Used in step 7 to set accounts to Closed and cancel all cards and payment instruments.” However, the system is also referenced in PS-CAC-002 (mandate check against account mandate in CBS) and PS-CAC-003 (Closure Analyst checks transactions and balances in CBS). The Role block is incomplete.

findings.title: Innovation traceability gap: TR-CAC-003 and CFT-CAC-001 have no innovation idea derived from them
findings.detail: TR-CAC-003 (AI-powered real-time sanctions screening trend, bearsOn PS-CAC-004 / CP-CAC-003) and CFT-CAC-001 (Fiserv agentOS competitor move, bearsOn PS-CAC-004 / CP-CAC-003 / CP-CAC-006) have no innovation-idea (II) element linking either as source. The transformation decision TD-CAC-003 (AI-enhanced sanctions screening) addresses TR-CAC-003 directly but has no fromIdea link — the trend→innovation-idea→transformation-decision traceability chain is broken for this theme.

findings.title: EX-CAC-003: handlingOwner is singular but exception covers two distinct routing paths
findings.detail: EX-CAC-003 (Open compliance case or sanctions hit) has handlingOwner: Financial Crime, but the handling block documents two separate routing paths: (1) live sanctions hit → Financial Crime; (2) open internal compliance case → Compliance. Should this exception be split into two separate exceptions — one for each routing path — or should handlingOwner be updated to reflect dual ownership? Currently, Compliance’s handling role is only in the prose, not in the structured frontmatter.
